title: Market Brief — Saturday, May 9, 2026
summary: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s face severe shortage at 10% with no tradeable pricing. The sharpest signal is H200 at 45% availability with 87.9% annualized price volatility and utilization surging 6.2pp to 88.1% in thirty days, confirming demand is migrating fast to next-gen silicon.
paragraphs: GPU supply is bifurcated: A100s sit at 85% availability (oversupply), H100s at 70%, and MI300X at 60%, while B200s are scarce at 25% and GB200s face severe shortage at 10% with no tradeable pricing. The sharpest signal is H200 at 45% availability with 87.9% annualized price volatility and utilization surging 6.2pp to 88.1% in thirty days, confirming demand is migrating fast to next-gen silicon.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), running Llama 70B on H100s costs roughly $9.84/M tokens, meaning any provider pricing medium-tier output at $3/M is selling at a loss of about $6.84 per million tokens. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.378/M output is burning cash hardest, losing an estimated $4.65/M tokens even on B200s (TCO $5.03/M). Provider grades: OpenAI Strong (premium pricing holds), Anthropic Neutral (tiered but compressed), Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

B200 compute at $4.20/hr spot is undervalued given 25% availability, rising utilization up 6.4pp, and the only GPU class generating positive margins at medium-tier pricing. A100 capacity at 85% availability and declining utilization (down 11.1pp) is overvalued for new inference deployments; sell A100 exposure and rotate into B200 reservations before scarcity pricing kicks in.
bullets: 10% availability on GB200s signals severe shortage with no spot price even established yet.
25% availability on B200s qualifies as scarce compute, yet spot median sits at just $4.20/hr.
87.9% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI pricing makes it the most unstable compute contract in the stack.
$0.378/M output from DeepSeek V3.2 represents the lowest token price across all 18 tracked models.
90.9% utilization on H100s is the highest across all GPU classes, up 6.9 percentage points in 30 days.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token costs have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
